---
name: "🚀 Feature Request (Design Doc Style)"
about: Propose a new feature with a detailed technical design.
title: "feat: <title>"
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Objective
<!-- What is the primary goal of this feature? -->

## 2. Motivation
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve for the user or the developer? -->

## 3. Proposed Design
### Architecture Changes
<!-- Describe changes to the resource structure, database schema, or services. -->

### API Changes
<!-- Describe new endpoints or changes to existing ones. -->

### UI/UX (if applicable)
<!-- Describe changes to the frontend. -->

## 4. Alternatives Considered
<!-- Why did you choose this design over others? -->

## 5. Implementation Plan
- [ ] **Step 1**: Migration / Schema changes
- [ ] **Step 2**: Repository / Usecase implementation
- [ ] **Step 3**: Handler / Route registration

## 6. Testing & Verification
### Test Case Matrix
| Test Case | Scenario | Expected Outcome |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Happy Path** | <!-- e.g. Normal usage --> | <!-- e.g. Feature works --> |
| **Auth Check** | <!-- e.g. Unauthorized user --> | <!-- e.g. 401 Unauthorized --> |
| **Validation** | <!-- e.g. Invalid input --> | <!-- e.g. 400 Bad Request --> |
| **Edge Case** | <!-- e.g. Boundary values --> | <!-- e.g. Handled correctly --> |

<!-- How will we know this feature works as intended? -->
- [ ] E2E tests for the new flow.
- [ ] Edge cases coverage.

## 7. Open Questions
<!-- Any uncertainties or areas requiring more research? -->
